relations.evidence: role of GLP-1RAs in pain management
In osteoarthritis, they appear to reduce inflammation and cartilage degradation
In diabetic neuropathy, GLP-1RAs show potential for nerve repair
Preclinical data support GLP-1RAs signaling in migraines, but human studies are lacking
Trials in alcohol addiction show promise
dopaminergic pathways in substance use disorders
